name: agentic-coding-fitness

owner.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar

description: Learn-by-doing skills for building production agentic AI (course weeks 2–18): the fundamentals (LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP, RAG, multi-agent systems, knowledge-graph memory, production GraphRAG with evaluation) plus the 12-pattern taxonomy, production & observability, agent evaluation/CI gating, the NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit, long-running & distributed agents (Google ADK, auth.md, A2A), Week 18's Claude Agent SDK production loop, self-evolving agents with tripartite memory, sovereign AI at the edge (local/$0 inference), a drill library, the curriculum, vibe-coding & security, and skill-authoring.

plugins.name: agentic-coding-fitness
plugins.description: 20 concept-and-practice skills that teach, demo, and run guided labs for the whole course (weeks 2–18): talking to LLMs, tool use, the agent loop, MCP & skills, RAG, multi-agent patterns, agent memory with Neo4j, production GraphRAG with RAGAS evaluation, choosing models/patterns (12-pattern taxonomy), production & observability (HITL, LangSmith, cost), agent evaluation with CI gates, the NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit, long-running & distributed agents (Google ADK durable sessions, pause/resume, auth.md, A2A fleets), the Claude Agent SDK production loop, self-evolving agents with tripartite memory + consolidation, sovereign AI at the edge (local/on-device, $0-per-token), a drill library, the curriculum, vibe-coding & security, the A2A protocol, and authoring your own skills.
